channel.title: Curriculum Vitae on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Curriculum Vitae on Eric Spencer

item.title: Founder
item.description: Photo editing app built because nothing on the App Store was doing what I wanted.

item.title: Founder
item.description: No-code eCommerce storefronts that aren't hidden behind a monthly subscription.

item.title: Founder
item.description: Lightweight AI-assisted stock analysis and portfolio helper for hobby traders.

item.title: Founder
item.description: Independent software studio shipping small, subscription-free tools built entirely in the United States.

item.title: ITS Service Desk Technician
item.description: Provide frontline technical support and access management.

item.title: Researcher
item.description: Research on TLA+ and fine-tuning open-source LLMs for formal methods.

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Full-stack implementations and interactive claims dashboard for B2B SaaS portal.

item.title: Software Engineer
item.description: Implemented a web-based visualization and demo application for TLA+ using Spring Boot and Vaadin.

item.title: Software Engineering Intern
item.description: Backend automation and workflow optimization using Google Apps Script.

item.title: Vice President of Technology
item.description: Managed and coordinated semester-long technical projects for the club.

item.title: ITS Service Desk Technician
item.description: Provided frontline technical support and access management.

item.title: Jr. AI Prompt Engineer
item.description: Created and refined prompts for ChatGPT-4 to meet specific criteria and improve output quality.

item.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
item.description: Research on AI interpretability and experimental studies involving ChatGPT and advanced Java concepts.

item.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
item.description: Computer Science major with an Information Systems minor.

item.title: Seller
item.description: E-commerce seller handling sourcing, listings, and customer service.

item.title: Honor Caddie
item.description: Seasonal hospitality and customer service role.
